infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: We use your location to personalize nearby food and restaurant recommendations while you're using the app.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Used to record your voice when you talk to the AI nutrition coach.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Calorie-AI to use your camera to scan meals.
plugins.photosPermission: Allow Calorie-AI to access your photos to analyze meal images.
